export const JOB_ICONS = {
  'Warlock': '🔮',
  'Wizard': '🌊',
  'Hunter': '🏹',
  'Assassin': '🗡️',
  'Knight': '⚔️',
  'Crusader': '🛡️',
  'Priest': '✝️',
  'Monk': '👊',
  'Bard': '🎵',
  'Dancer': '💃',
  'Blacksmith': '🔨',
  'Alchemist': '⚗️',
  'Rogue': '🌑',
  'Sage': '📚'
};

export const JOBS = Object.keys(JOB_ICONS);
export const ROLES = ['DPS', 'Support', 'Tank'];
